changelog.label: CRITICAL FIX: Wire SMC engine into trade cycle + gate tuning
changes: BUG: scanSMC() was never imported or called in cycle.js — all 9 SMC strategies were dead code
FIX: Import scanSMC from liquidity-sweep-engine.js in cycle.js
FIX: Call scanSMC() each cycle alongside aiSignals, spikeHL, T-junction
FIX: SMC signals get strategyWinRate=60-70 to bypass backtest gate
Backtest gate: MIN_WIN_RATE stays 50% for real backtested strategies
Backtest gate: bypass threshold raised 55→60 (only trusted WR>=60 signals bypass)
Backtest gate: SMC strategies removed from KNOWN_STRATEGIES — use 60+ WR bypass path instead of unreliable backtest sim
SMC signals logged: 'SMC Engine: N signal(s) — SYMBOL DIR [SETUP] score=X'
Root cause of zero trades since launch: scanSMC was NEVER in the execution pipeline

changelog.label: Fix range detection + add Consolidation Rejection strategy
changes: Fix RANGE_BOUNCE: EMA spread threshold loosened 1.5% → 2.5% (was blocking all post-trend consolidations)
Fix RANGE_BOUNCE: lookback reduced 40 → 25 candles (focuses on current range, not old trend candles)
Fix RANGE_BOUNCE: wall proximity tolerance widened 0.3% → 0.5% (catches more valid entries)
Add Strategy 8: CONSOL_REJECTION — detects price coiling after a strong move then rejecting at extreme
SHORT: EMA9<EMA21 (downtrend) + price at top 65%+ of consolidation + bearish candle → short the coil top
LONG: EMA9>EMA21 (uptrend) + price at bottom 35% of consolidation + bullish candle → long the coil bottom
Consolidation confirmed when recent-10 ATR < 65% of prior-15 ATR (price coiling = energy building)
VWAP_REJECTION renamed Strategy 9 (was 8) to make room
This fix catches the ETH/BNB consolidation-top short that was previously missed

changelog.label: 24/7 trading + VWAP Rejection strategy
changes: Remove ALL time restrictions — bot scans and trades 24/7 based purely on signal score
Removed: SESSION_WINDOWS, AVOID_HOURS_UTC, getActiveSession(), isAvoidTime() logic
Removed: session score bonus (+2 in-session) and penalty (-1 outside session)
Removed: outsideSession parameter from analyzeCoin()
scanSMC log now shows '24/7' instead of session name
Add Strategy 8: VWAP Rejection — detects price poking through VWAP then closing back
VWAP SHORT: 15m candle high > VWAP, close < VWAP, rejection wick ≥ 50% of body
VWAP LONG: 15m candle low < VWAP, close > VWAP, rejection wick ≥ 50% of body
SL: beyond wick tip + 0.5×ATR buffer. TP: 2×ATR dynamic target (RR ~1:2)
VWAP hoisted to function scope so both bias check and rejection strategy share it

changelog.label: Fix SL back to margin-based (30% of trade), keep price-based trailing
changes: SL: always 30% from entry PRICE regardless of leverage (was SL_PCT/leverage = 0.3% at 100x, now capped at liquidation guard 80% of liq distance)
At 20x (BNB/SOL): SL capped at 4% from entry (80% of 5% liq distance) — was 1.5%
At 100x (BTC/ETH): SL capped at 0.8% from entry (80% of 1% liq distance) — was 0.3%
Trailing SL: rewritten to price-based tiers (no leverage conversion)
Trailing rule: first fires at +30% price gain → lock +10% above entry
Every +15% more price gain → add +10% to the locked SL
Gap between current price and trailing SL: always ~20% — much more breathing room
Candle-low trail (15m) unchanged — still provides early locking during normal moves

changelog.label: Fix BNB/SOL defaulting to 100x leverage — root cause of tight SL
changes: Bug: getTokenLeverage() fallback (priority 4) put BNB and SOL in HIGH_PRICE_TOKENS with BTC/ETH → all defaulted to 100x when no DB setting existed
At 100x: BNB SL = 0.30/100 = 0.3% = $1.80 at $600 BNB — clipped by normal candle wicks
Fix: explicit per-symbol defaults — BTC/ETH → 100x, BNB/SOL → 20x, matches admin UI token card labels
At 20x: BNB SL = 0.30/20 = 1.5% = $9 — survives normal volatility
Price-based fallback for other tokens updated: ≥$1000 → 100x, ≥$100 → 50x, else → 20x

changelog.label: Fix SL + trailing SL too near at high leverage
changes: Add MIN_SL_PRICE_PCT = 0.005 (0.5%) — hard floor on SL distance from entry regardless of leverage
At 100x: SL was 0.3% (too tight) → now guaranteed minimum 0.5% ($450 on BTC $90k)
Applied to both owner account entry and all user account entries
Trailing tier gap widened: 4% → 8% margin between trigger and lock-in level
Trailing SL now stays further behind current price, reducing premature stop-outs on retracements
Scanner ATR SL multiplier: 1.2× → 1.5× — signal-level SL gets more breathing room vs candle wicks

changelog.label: Multi-language support — EN / 中文 / BM
changes: Add i18n system: client-side translation dictionary for English, Chinese Simplified, Bahasa Malaysia
Language switcher dropdown in app header (flag + label, persists across sessions via localStorage)
data-i18n attributes on all static UI elements: nav tabs, table headers, period filters, empty states, buttons, labels
Dynamic UI (pause bot status, Kronos bullish/bearish/neutral counts) uses i18n.t() at render time
togglePause state detection rewritten to use data-i18n attribute (not textContent) — language-safe
CSS: .i18n-switcher, .i18n-dropdown styles added to style.css

changelog.label: Revert v1.0.3 — cash wallet stays 0 until top-up or referral commission
changes: Reverted v1.0.3: recordProfitSplit no longer touches cash_wallet
Cash wallet correct model: only grows from manual top-ups + referral commission when referral pays weekly fee
Trade profits (60%/40%) logged in wallet_transactions for PnL display only — not credited to cash wallet
Cash wallet breakdown display: removed profit_share row, kept top-ups + referral commission + fees paid
Updated breakdown note to clearly explain the cash wallet model

changelog.label: Auto-credit profit splits to cash wallet on every trade close
changes: recordProfitSplit: user's 60% share now credited to users.cash_wallet immediately when trade closes
recordProfitSplit: platform's 40% fee now credited to all admin users' cash_wallet automatically
Admins split equally if multiple admin accounts exist
wallet_transactions still recorded for full audit trail
Cash wallet breakdown note updated: 60% shown as real credited amount, not exchange-only reference
Previously: profit split was logged only, no cash_wallet was ever updated from trades

changelog.label: Fix admin user list showing wallet_balance instead of cash_wallet
changes: Bug: admin Users table showed wallet_balance column (always $0) instead of cash_wallet + commission_earned
Fix: renderAdminUsers now computes bal = cash_wallet + commission_earned — matches dashboard display
Fix: Edit Wallet button pre-fills correct balance (was always pre-filling $0)

changelog.label: Fix Kronos 4-token filter + cash wallet breakdown display
changes: Kronos route: filter DB results to only BTCUSDT/ETHUSDT/SOLUSDT/BNBUSDT — old 10-token rows excluded
Kronos header: updated label from '(10 tokens)' to '(N tokens — BTC/ETH/SOL/BNB)'
Cash wallet breakdown: profit_shares were computed server-side but never rendered on screen — now shown
Cash wallet breakdown: replaced flat text with itemised table (top-ups / referral commission / 60% profits / fees paid)
Cash wallet: added note clarifying 60% trade profits stay on exchange, shown for reference only

changelog.label: Filter Fixes + 24/7 Optimizer + Versioning
changes: Fix: all strategies run 24/7 — session gate changed from hard block to +2 score bonus in-session / -1 out-of-session
Fix: EMA200 bias changed from hard block (score=-99) to -3 penalty / +2 bonus
Fix: removed AVOID_MINUTES blackout (00/15/30/45 min) — was killing too many valid entries
Fix: session open 30-min blackout removed
Fix: MIN_SCORE fallback lowered 8→6
Fix: MOMENTUM_SCALP trendStrength 7→5, pinBarWickRatio 2.5→2.0
Fix: RSI hard block raised to RSI>78 long / RSI<22 short
RANGE_BOUNCE: detect walls from swing clusters (findSwingWalls), not absolute max/min
RANGE_BOUNCE: wall-only entries — 0.3% tolerance, mid-range (25-75%) blocked
Per-symbol daily trade limits — all 4 coins trade independently
Remove daily trade count cap — trade on valid signals only
Kronos + AI scanner limited to BTCUSDT/ETHUSDT/SOLUSDT/BNBUSDT only
Chart indicator font set to 15pt
RANGE_BOUNCE added to backtest gate (KNOWN_STRATEGIES)
Token pool seeding: only on first boot, not on every restart
Exhaustive 24/7 optimizer (genetic search) added — background agent
Optimizer results API: GET /api/dashboard/optimizer/results
Version system: version.json + bump-version.js + GET /api/version

changelog.label: Trailing SL Watchdog + Structural Entry Guards + Range Filter
changes: Candle-low trailing SL — SL follows previous 15m candle low (LONG) / high (SHORT)
Trail SL watchdog runs as separate process every 15s — persistent, never misses a move
Trailing SL profit tier guarantee — locks in profit before candle trail kicks in
Fee floor on first SL — minimum 1% gain before SL trails to protect from fee loss
SHORT bias at range top — detects resistance and prefers short signals near highs
Block LONG/SHORT at structural extremes — buy HL/LL only, sell HH/LH only
Add 1m spike hard block — stops entering during fast pump/dump candles
Fix Bitunix trailing SL: positionId lookup was silently returning false
Fix SMC_HL_STRUCTURE: buy at HL retest bottom, not breakout top
Fix trailing SL precision + extend re-entry cooldown to 60min
Fix: scanAI falls back to classic SMC when no learned strategies exist
Add range filter to ai-signal-scanner — the real signal source for Kronos
Switch ChartAgent to liquidity-sweep-engine — disable ai-signal-scanner
Add auto-deploy script — pulls latest code and restarts on new push
Add VSA Multi Volume Histogram to MCT chart
Fix 3 blockers causing zero trades to execute
Disable Triple MA strategy — 24.1% WR in backtest (net -24.7%)

changelog.label: Stable Checkpoint — Bitunix SL Fix (early Apr 17)
changes: Fix Bitunix trailing SL: positionId lookup was silently returning false
This tag was set as a stable rollback point before further Apr 17 changes

changelog.label: Pre-fix Checkpoint — scanAI fallback (mid Apr 17)
changes: Fix: scanAI falls back to classic SMC when no learned strategies exist
This tag was set as a checkpoint before the trailing SL watchdog changes

changelog.label: MCT PDF Strategy + SMC HL/LH Structure + Zeiierman
changes: Implement MCT PDF strategy rules for SMC HL/LH trades
SMC HL/LH structure strategy with Zeiierman curved band detection
Chart 1m candle display fix
Add funding_fee as separate tracked field across all trade paths
Bitunix referral link per user, platform guide download
Live exchange positions visible in emergency close panel
Remove ERROR trades from trade history for all accounts
Fix Binance API method name: getAccountTradeList → getAccountTrades
Fix double fee deduction in cycle.js Bitunix trade close sync
Fix Bitunix trade history sync: wrong side check + double fee
Fix backtest gate blocking AI signals that already have their own WR
Relax SMC entry timing: swing age 3→6, chase distance 0.4%→0.6%
Fix zero-trade issue: backtest gate blocked everything at 80% WR
Fix 11 critical/high/medium bugs found in code review
Wire Hermes memory into all agents — persistent cross-agent intelligence
Fix email tab visibility on dark theme
Disable HTML caching so updates deploy instantly
Fix JSON parse crash: missing /api prefix on brain-status fetch
